Class CIMColorSubstitution

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM
Assembly
ESRI.Server.CIM.dll

Represents color substitution, an ordered list of color substitutes.

public class CIMColorSubstitution : CIMObject, IJsonSerializable

Gets or sets the new color that will replace the old color.
